_instructions: Add your work experience here. Copy the experience object for each job.

experiences.title: Research Assistant (Data Analytics)
experiences.company: University of Texas at Arlington – SEAR Lab
experiences.description:
Analyzed 15,000+ RFID commissioning records across multiple deployment environments, quantifying 12% variance in read accuracy and isolating operational performance gaps.
Built and automated Python and SQL data validation workflows to clean and structure 50+ experimental datasets, reducing preprocessing time by 40% and improving downstream data reliability.
Produced statistical performance analyses and interactive dashboards supporting 3 concurrent research initiatives, enabling 8–15% optimization improvements in controlled system evaluations.

experiences.title: Data Analyst
experiences.description:
Analyzed and validated data quality across millions of labeled image records, surfacing error patterns that cut data error rates by 20% and lifted downstream model accuracy by 15%
Defined data-quality metrics and structured review workflows in Samsung R&D's Datagen platform, improving dataset accuracy by 30% and data-pipeline efficiency by 25% across multiple AI initiatives
Profiled and streamlined data-processing pipelines with cross-functional AI teams, reducing time-to-production and improving operational data quality at production scale

experiences.title: Data Science Intern
experiences.description:
Designed and implemented an end-to-end recommendation pipeline on 500K+ user records, delivering personalized diet insights to 10K+ users and increasing engagement by 15% through behavioral pattern analysis.
Developed SQL-based ETL data pipelines using MySQL and PostgreSQL for large-scale user data, reducing query latency by 25% and enabling real-time analytics for ML applications.
Created backend analytics services using Python and Flask to support scalable data processing, reporting, and KPI tracking, partnering with product and engineering teams to translate business requirements into measurable data science solutions.
